name: 7 Days of Romance
overview: Da Eun works part-time and Kim Byul is an idol in her 5th years since debut. These two girls who look alike decide to change each other’s lives just for 7 days. It tells the romantic encounters of these 2 girls.

trailers.title: 잠수이별한 남친 찾는 법 [7일만 로맨스2] TEASER | 12월 29일 (화) 오후 6시 첫방송❣ | ENG SUB
